title: jurinea mobayenii
intro: Jurinea mobayenii, also known as Sartorii, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly found in the mountainous regions of Iran. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Jurinea mobayenii include its ability to alleviate symptoms of indigestion, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce fever and treat wounds. Jurinea mobayenii can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in dried or powdered form for various health remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
